docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,103.00 FILED BY TURRICIANO-HOKURA, DENA AS TO DEFENDANT KELLY, MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-28-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KELLY, MICHAEL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TURRICIANO-HOKURA, DENA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KELLY, MICHAEL $2,103.00 PRINCIPAL, $97.00 INTEREST, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,252.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-01-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-15-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PARTIES SETTLED. TOTAL AMT OWED, $2,200 - $2103.00 PLUS $97 INTEREST, PAYABLE $300 PER MONTH STARTING SEPT. 15, 2005. CONTINUE EVERY 6 MOS. FOR PROGRESS REPORT UNTIL PAID IN FULL.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-28-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-01-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PLAINTIFF IS IN THE HOSPITAL.
